case_title: PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ERIC ROJO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ROJO, ERIC DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-26-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-21-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2017

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17037022), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JAN-12-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JAN-13-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT ROJO, ERIC
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17087036) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-26-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-28-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17109021) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $439.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 17109021) AS TO DEFENDANT ROJO, ERIC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585 (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 17109021) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585 (D) AND EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 17109021) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROJO, ERIC $12,570.77 PRINCIPAL, $439.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,009.77, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-28-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
